feed.title: Minchin.ca - Comments: Chinese Public Transportation: A History and a Vision to the Future

entry.title: Posted by: Wm. Minchin
entry.summary: Hey Matthew. There is an updated version of the map at Transport Politic (about halfway down).
entry.content: Hey Matthew. There is an updated version of the map at Transport Politic (about halfway down).

entry.title: Posted by: Matthew Hartzell
entry.summary:
Hi, like your blog.

But your map of Chinese future high speed rail is out of date. Kunming is building high speed lines not only to Guiyang and Dali, but also to Nanning and Chengdu. Can you please edit your map to reflect this? Thanks!
entry.content:
Hi, like your blog.

But your map of Chinese future high speed rail is out of date. Kunming is building high speed lines not only to Guiyang and Dali, but also to Nanning and Chengdu. Can you please edit your map to reflect this? Thanks!

entry.title: Posted by: Jens-Peter Labus
entry.summary: Excellent. I just wrote a post on my blog about my experience with the Shanghai Metro and came across your blog. Great work!
entry.content: Excellent. I just wrote a post on my blog about my experience with the Shanghai Metro and came across your blog. Great work!
